Class CookingCompleteTrigger

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.skill.trigger.CookingCompleteTrigger
All Implemented Interfaces:
PassiveTrigger
public final class CookingCompleteTrigger extends Object implements PassiveTrigger
Trigger token fired when a cooking station completes a recipe. Passives accumulate an XP multiplier via multiplyXp(double), quality weight shifts via shiftQuality(CookingQuality, double), and an optional bonus drop via setBonusOutput(ItemStack).

  • Constructor Details

    • CookingCompleteTrigger

      public CookingCompleteTrigger(CookingRecipe recipe)
      Parameters:
      recipe - the recipe that just completed

  • Method Details

    • recipe

      public CookingRecipe recipe()
      Returns:
      the recipe that completed

    • preserveIngredient

      public void preserveIngredient()
      Marks that one matched ingredient should not be consumed by this cook.

    • shouldPreserveIngredient

      public boolean shouldPreserveIngredient()
      Returns:
      true if one ingredient should be preserved this cook

    • multiplyXp

      public void multiplyXp(double factor)
      Multiplies the accumulated XP multiplier by the given factor.
      Parameters:
      factor - the multiplier to apply, e.g. 1.5 for +50% XP

    • xpMultiplier

      public double xpMultiplier()
      Returns the combined XP multiplier accumulated from all passives. Starts at 1.0; each call to multiplyXp(double) compounds it.
      Returns:
      the final XP multiplier

    • setBonusOutput

      public void setBonusOutput(@Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item)
      Sets a bonus output item to be dropped at the station. Only the last passive to call this wins; earlier ones are overwritten.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to drop as a bonus, or null to clear

    • shiftQuality

      public void shiftQuality(CookingQuality tier, double delta)
      Adds a weight delta to the given quality tier's probability. Positive values increase the chance of that tier; negative values decrease it. Deltas from multiple passives accumulate additively. The roller clamps each tier at zero so negative totals cannot invert weights.
      Parameters:
      tier - the tier to shift
      delta - the weight delta to add

    • qualityShifts

      public Map<CookingQuality, Double> qualityShifts()
      Returns the accumulated per-tier weight deltas contributed by all passives. The returned map is unmodifiable.
      Returns:
      quality weight shifts, keyed by tier

    • bonusOutput

      public @Nullable org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack bonusOutput()
      Returns:
      the bonus output item, or null if none was set

    • record

      public void record(String source, String description, boolean active)
      Description copied from interface: PassiveTrigger
      Records an ability's contribution to this trigger for debug tracing. No-op by default; override in concrete trigger classes that support tracing.
      Specified by:
      record in interface PassiveTrigger
      Parameters:
      source - display name of the contributing ability
      description - short human-readable description of what the ability did
      active - true if the contribution came from an active ability

    • traceEntries

      public List<TraceEntry> traceEntries()
      Description copied from interface: PassiveTrigger
      Returns all trace entries recorded on this trigger, in the order they were added. Returns an empty list by default.
      Specified by:
      traceEntries in interface PassiveTrigger
      Returns:
      recorded contributions, or an empty list if tracing is not supported
